title: Stable Channel To Beta Upgrade
objective: Start a disposable OpenClaw env on the stable channel, run the real upgrade path to beta, and verify channel upgrade behavior, plugin index migration, bundled runtime deps, and gateway health.

phases.title: Start Stable Channel Env
phases.intent: Create a disposable env through the real stable channel before switching to beta.

phases.title: Upgrade To Beta
phases.intent: Run the real OpenClaw upgrade path to the beta channel through OCM.

phases.title: Post-Beta Upgrade Checks
phases.intent: Verify OpenClaw is usable after the beta channel upgrade and capture plugin/runtime dependency evidence.
evidence: gateway logs without missing dependency/plugin load failures
